raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Absaloms bij Aina-
19. su Joaba Weetâ pahr to Karra.
Spehku lizzis/ un Amasus bja
kahda Wibra Dehts/ Jetrus
Wahrda/ weena Israêlitera/ kas
pee Abigâiles/ Nakafa Meitas/
Zerujas Mahfas/ Joaba Mah-
tes/ bij gullejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Israêls un Absaloms
avmettehs eekjch tahs Seimnes
Gileadas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad Dahwids uhs Ma-
anaim bij nahzis/ tad neffe So-
bi Nakasa Dehts/ no Rabbas to
Ammona Behrnu (Pilssahtu)/
un Makirs Ammiêta Dehts no
Lodabara/ un Barsillajus tas
Gileaditeris no Roglim/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Gullanas Drehbes/ un
Kaufus/ un Mahlu Traukus/ un
Kweeschus/ un Meechus/ un
Miltus/ un Swillinatu Labbibu/
un Puppas/ un Lehzas/ kas arri
fwillinatas bja/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Meddu/ un Sweestu/
un Awis/ un Gohwju Seerus
pee Dahwida/ un pee teem Lau-
dim/ kas pee winna bja/ Eh-
schanas pehz/ jo tee fazzija: Tee
Laudis buhs isfakufchi/ un pee-
kufchi/ un isflahpufchi Tuks-
neft.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "N Dahwids fatatsija
tohs Laudis/ kas pee
winna bja/ un cezehle
pahr teem Ahwerstus un Kap-
teines.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Dahwids isfuhtija
tohs Laudis/ weenu treschu Tee-
fu zaur Joaba Rohku/ un ohtru
treschu Teefu zaur Abisaju Ze-
rujas Dehtu/ Joaba Brahli /
un to treschu zaur Itaju to Ge-
titeri.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninsch fazzija
us teem Laudim: Es pats arri
teescham ar jums tseefchn. Bet
tee Laudis fazzija: Tew ne buhs
tseet/ jo jepschu mehs behdsin beh-
gam/ tad teem tas pee Sirds ne
ees/ jepschu arri weena Putte
no mums nomirst/ tad tas teem
arri pee Sirds ne ees/ bet tu effi
ka definitis tuhkfstochno mums.
Tapehz buhs nu labbaks/ kad tu
mums is Pilssahta palihdsefi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninsch fazzija
us teem: Es darrischu/ kas jums
labbi patihk/ un tas Kehninsch
stahweja fahnis Wahrtim/ un
wisfi Laudis isgahje pa funteem
un pa tuhkfstocheem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninsch paweh-
leja Joabam un Abisajam un
Itajam/ un fazzija: Tanpeet to
Putti Absalomu/ un wisfi Lau-
dis dsirdeja to/ ka tas Kehninsch
is teem Ahwersteem to Lcetu no
Absaloma pawehleja.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
